summary: Updated docs/opencode-helper-cli.md to add install-wizard coverage: new functional requirements for an interactive global install wizard that updates PATH (zsh -> ~/.zshrc), non-interactive install flags, and idempotent shell config edits + sudo boundary; added FEAT-009 and user stories US-012/US-013 and wired them into the traceability matrix; updated PRD value/success bullets to explicitly mention global install that works in a new terminal.
tests_run: Manual link/anchor consistency check for new REQ/FEAT/US IDs
Manual check: new user stories reference at least one FEAT and one REQ
Manual check: traceability matrix includes new IDs and PRD-001 range updated
known_risks_or_limitations: Docs do not fully specify the bash/fish rc file selection rules yet (only the zsh rule is locked to ~/.zshrc).
